scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/clawjs/dist packages/clawjs-node/dist packages/clawjs-core/dist packages/clawjs-workspace/dist packages/clawjs-node-compat/dist packages/create-claw-app/dist packages/create-claw-agent/dist packages/create-claw-server/dist packages/create-claw-plugin/dist packages/eslint-config-claw/dist docs/.vitepress/cache website/dist dist .tmp-pack-smoke demo/.next demo/.next-e2e demo/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo relay/dist relay/.tmp database/dist database/.data database/output/playwright
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @clawjs/core && npm run build --workspace @clawjs/claw && npm run build --workspace @clawjs/workspace && npm run build --workspace @clawjs/node && npm run build --workspace @clawjs/cli && npm run build --workspace @clawjs/openclaw-plugin && npm run build --workspace @clawjs/openclaw-context-engine && npm run build --workspace create-claw-app && npm run build --workspace create-claw-agent && npm run build --workspace create-claw-server && npm run build --workspace create-claw-plugin && npm run build --workspace eslint-config-claw
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && npm run build:database && npm run build:relay && npm run build:website
scripts.test: node --test packages/clawjs-core/src/**/*.test.ts packages/clawjs-node/src/**/*.test.ts packages/clawjs-workspace/src/**/*.test.ts packages/clawjs-node-compat/src/**/*.test.ts packages/clawjs/src/**/*.test.ts packages/openclaw-plugin/src/**/*.test.ts packages/openclaw-context-engine/src/**/*.test.ts packages/create-claw-app/src/**/*.test.ts packages/create-claw-agent/src/**/*.test.ts packages/create-claw-server/src/**/*.test.ts packages/create-claw-plugin/src/**/*.test.ts packages/eslint-config-claw/src/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:packages && rm -rf demo/.next && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-e2e npm --prefix demo run build && node ./scripts/run-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:ci: npm run build:packages && rm -rf demo/.next && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-e2e npm --prefix demo run build && CI=1 node ./scripts/run-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:smoke-real: npm run build:packages && rm -rf demo/.next && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-e2e npm --prefix demo run build && playwright test --grep @smoke-real
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run database:test && npm run relay:test && npm run test:types && npm run test:ts && npm run build && npm run test:docs && npm run test:pack && npm run database:test:e2e && npm run relay:test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:ci
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm run build:packages && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/core && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/claw && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/workspace && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/node && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/cli && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/openclaw-plugin && npm publish --dry-run --access public --workspace @clawjs/openclaw-context-engine && npm publish --dry-run --workspace create-claw-app && npm publish --dry-run --workspace create-claw-agent && npm publish --dry-run --workspace create-claw-server && npm publish --dry-run --workspace create-claw-plugin && npm publish --dry-run --workspace eslint-config-claw
scripts.publish:packages: npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/core && npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/claw && npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/workspace && npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/node && npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/cli && npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/openclaw-plugin && npm publish --access public --workspace @clawjs/openclaw-context-engine && npm publish --workspace create-claw-app && npm publish --workspace create-claw-agent && npm publish --workspace create-claw-server && npm publish --workspace create-claw-plugin && npm publish --workspace eslint-config-claw
